---
title: ""
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 14em
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:send2amitkr@gmail.com"
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: "https://github.com/AmitKr-GitsHub"
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/amitkrlinked"
    - icon: telegram
      text: Telegram
      href: "https://t.me/tell_amitkr"
    - icon: instagram
      text: Instagram
      href: "https://instagram.com/named_amitkr"
---

::: {.about-entity}
## Amit Kr Eshore

I am a quantitative economist with a focus on data science, econometrics, and impact analysis. I specialize in building robust models—from panel data analysis; multifaceted data problems; to increasing productivity by solving real life problems. This space showcases my projects, interests and my journey.  

<div class="home-buttons">
<a class="btn btn-outline-primary" href="cv.qmd">CV</a>
<a class="btn btn-outline-primary" href="projects.qmd">Projects</a>
<a class="btn btn-outline-primary" href="public-goods.qmd">Public Goods</a>
<a class="btn btn-outline-primary" href="blogs.qmd">Blogs</a>
</div>
:::

::: {.updates-box}
### Updates

- **Mar 2026** • Working on term paper for Education as well as Climate Policy.

:::
